mnemonics: S.E.C.U.R.E. AI: Systems Engineered Correctly Using Reliable Engineering for AI
keyPoints: Reliability is achieved through rigorous testing and validation processes.
System design must incorporate principles of safety, security, and robustness from the outset (shift-left approach).
Maintain clear documentation and version control to ensure transparency and reproducibility.
commonMistakes: Prioritizing model performance metrics (e.g., accuracy) over system reliability and safety.
Treating AI system development as a purely research-oriented task instead of applying established software engineering disciplines.
Failing to plan for ongoing monitoring, maintenance, and updates post-deployment.
